channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
试了一下，这GPT image 2.0 的确有点夸张了，就这样一句简单的话:
“生成一张关于食物的信息图。左边展示健身前和健身时建议吃的食物，右边展示不建议在健身期间吃的食物。
请用清晰明了且直观...
item.description:
试了一下，这GPT image 2.0 的确有点夸张了，就这样一句简单的话:
“生成一张关于食物的信息图。左边展示健身前和健身时建议吃的食物，右边展示不建议在健身期间吃的食物。
请用清晰明了且直观的信息图方式来呈现这些内容。” https://t.co/sQhstdkv6h
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 359
item.author: @bearliu

item.title:

item.description:

Imagine waking up in total darkness… but you can still s…

item.author: @DeepLearn007

item.title: Not too long ago a group of staff at a big 4 and an “AI ethics” person used to criticise my posts th...
item.description:
Not too long ago a group of staff at a big 4 and an “AI ethics” person used to criticise my posts that featured robotic images.saying robotics was too distant and remote and AI was mobile apps and web systems.
They ignored how rapidly technology evolves and my intent to signal where AI was going to end up - that is into the physical world.
--- @DeepLearn007 | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 50
item.author: @DeepLearn007
